homepage_role: JoySpace is not a surface page. It is a layered family, proof, class, and skill navigation system.

levels.name: Love First
levels.purpose: Mrs. Wisdom and family approval membrane before brand or proof theater.

levels.name: Identity Seal
levels.purpose: jaywisdom.eth long-term identity and root claims.

levels.name: Base Execution
levels.purpose: jaywisdom.base.eth future receipts, Zora public references, and L2 comparison lanes.

levels.name: Skills On Demand
levels.purpose: Reusable JoySpace frames, operator skills, AI builder/verifier roles, and CWaaS buttons.

levels.name: Computer Class Projects
levels.purpose: Bri, Bre, Boss Brenda, and Wisdom Girls learn JSON, CSV, Base hygiene, and public byte comparison.

levels.name: Public Proof Gate
levels.purpose: HTTP 200, content marker, SHA256 equality, changelog update, privacy check, and human approval.

green_rule: HTTP_200 + SHA256(repo_source) == SHA256(public_body) + CONTENT_MARKER + PRIVACY_CHECK + HUMAN_VISUAL_CONFIRM
